esp32_ble_init.tooltip: Initialize the BLE device and set the device name

esp32_ble_get_address.tooltip: Get the local BLE MAC address

esp32_ble_set_mtu.tooltip: Set BLE MTU size (maximum transmission unit)

esp32_ble_server_create_service.message0: Create service %2 UUID %3 on the server side %1
esp32_ble_server_create_service.tooltip: Create a GATT service on the server side

esp32_ble_create_characteristic.message0: In service %1 create feature %2 UUID %3 attribute %4
esp32_ble_create_characteristic.tooltip: Create characteristic values in the service

esp32_ble_add_descriptor.tooltip: Add BLE2902 descriptor to support notification function

esp32_ble_start_advertising.tooltip: Start BLE broadcast to make the device discoverable

esp32_ble_advertising_set_scan_response.tooltip: Set whether to enable scan response

esp32_ble_on_connect.message0: When the BLE client connects the server %1
esp32_ble_on_connect.tooltip: Executed when a client connects to the BLE server

esp32_ble_on_disconnect.message0: When the BLE client is disconnected, the server %1
esp32_ble_on_disconnect.tooltip: Executed when the client disconnects the BLE connection

esp32_ble_on_write.tooltip: Executed when the characteristic value is written by the client

esp32_ble_server_connected_count.tooltip: Get the number of clients currently connected to the server

esp32_ble_client_connect.tooltip: Connect to the BLE device at the specified address

esp32_ble_client_is_connected.tooltip: Check if the client is connected

esp32_ble_remote_characteristic_read.message0: Read the value of remote feature %1
esp32_ble_remote_characteristic_read.tooltip: Read data from remote feature values

esp32_ble_remote_characteristic_write.tooltip: Write data to remote feature value

esp32_ble_remote_characteristic_can_read.tooltip: Check if the remote characteristic value is readable

esp32_ble_remote_characteristic_can_noti.tooltip: Check if the remote characteristic value supports notifications

esp32_ble_scan_set_active.tooltip: Set whether to use active scanning mode

esp32_ble_scan_results_count.tooltip: Get the number of scanned devices

esp32_ble_scan_results_get_device.tooltip: Get scanned devices based on index

esp32_ble_advertised_device_name.tooltip: Get the name of the broadcast device

esp32_ble_advertised_device_address.tooltip: Get the MAC address of the broadcasting device

esp32_ble_advertised_device_rssi.tooltip: Get the signal strength of a broadcast device

esp32_ble_uart_server_quick.message0: Create BLE serial port server device name %1
esp32_ble_uart_server_quick.tooltip: Quickly create a BLE UART server (Nordic UART Service)

esp32_ble_uart_send.tooltip: Send data through BLE serial port

esp32_ble_uart_on_receive.message0: When the BLE serial port receives data
esp32_ble_uart_on_receive.tooltip: Executed when the BLE serial port receives data

esp32_ble_uart_received_data.message0: Data received by BLE serial port
esp32_ble_uart_received_data.tooltip: Get the data received by the BLE serial port (used in the callback)

esp32_ble_uart_is_connected.tooltip: Check whether there is a client connection to the BLE serial port
